cascade_issues.title: Power generation reduction
cascade_issues.description: Removing one solar panel reduces the total power generation capacity, potentially exceeding the average power consumption during eclipse and peak imaging mode requirements.

cascade_issues.title: Structural balance disruption
cascade_issues.description: The removal of one solar panel disrupts the structural balance and symmetry, potentially affecting the payload's dynamic response to launch vibrations.

cascade_issues.title: Thermal imbalance
cascade_issues.description: The removal of one solar panel may cause thermal imbalances, affecting the temperature stability and control across orbital cycles.

missing_tests.activity: Shock test to validate structural integrity after solar panel removal
missing_tests.reason: The change affects the mechanical subsystem's balance and requires revalidation of shock response.

missing_tests.activity: Thermal balance test to validate thermal stability after solar panel removal
missing_tests.reason: The change may introduce thermal imbalances that need verification through a new thermal balance test.
